summary: Tested iteration 60 features: Mobile view improvements for Achats & Dépenses (390x844 viewport) and Toggle 'Liste d'origine / Liste corrigée' for admin_review expenses. All features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: AchatsTab.jsx lines 128-138: reviewViewMode state correctly manages toggle state per expense, with getReviewViewMode() providing role-based defaults (admin='corrected', manager='original')
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1126-1154: Toggle UI with data-testid='review-view-toggle-{expense.id}' renders correctly with '📋 Liste d'origine' and '✏️ Liste corrigée' buttons
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1157-1296: Admin editor only shows when !showOriginal (corrected view selected), correctly hidden in original view
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1299-1342: Read-only list shown to manager always, and to admin when 'original' is selected. Displays correct items based on showOriginal flag
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1173-1203: Mobile-friendly 2-row layout for admin editor items - Row 1: checkbox+index+description+delete, Row 2: category+qty+PU+total
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1312-1329: Read-only items use flex-col sm:flex-row for responsive layout
AchatsTab.jsx lines 1333-1339: Total label adapts: 'Total d'origine' vs 'Total corrigé' based on showOriginal flag
AchatsTab.jsx lines 920-949: Pending list items use flex-col sm:flex-row layout for mobile responsiveness
AchatsTab.jsx line 293: Sub-tabs container has overflow-x-auto class for horizontal scrolling on mobile
seed_data_creation: Created test expense 'TEST mobile+toggle iter60' with 3 items (30000 F total). Moved to admin_review with corrections: Item B qty 10→15, Item C struck (motif: À reporter). Original amount: 30000 F, Corrected amount: 25000 F. Test data cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 added: (1) Mobile improvements for Achats & Dépenses at 390x844 viewport - sub-tabs horizontally scrollable, pending list items use flex-col layout, admin editor uses 2-row layout per item. (2) Toggle 'Liste d'origine / Liste corrigée' for admin_review expenses - visible to both admin and gérante when expense has original_items snapshot. Admin default: 'Liste corrigée' (can edit), Gérante default: 'Liste d'origine' (read-only). Toggle switches between original snapshot and current corrected items. Totals adapt: 'Total d'origine' vs 'Total corrigé'. Struck items appear with line-through and red background in corrected view.

mobile_390x844: Sub-tabs horizontally scrollable with overflow-x-auto - VERIFIED
Pending expenses card displays without major overflow - VERIFIED
Pending list items use flex-col layout on mobile - VERIFIED (class: 'flex flex-col gap-2')
Admin editor uses 2-row layout: Row 1 = checkbox+index+description+delete, Row 2 = category+qty+PU+total - VERIFIED
All inputs usable on mobile (no overflow, proper sizing) - VERIFIED
Admin review section displays correctly on mobile - VERIFIED
toggle_original_corrected: Toggle appears under header for admin_review expenses with original_items - VERIFIED (data-testid='review-view-toggle-{expense.id}')
Toggle buttons: '📋 Liste d'origine' and '✏️ Liste corrigée' - VERIFIED
Admin default view: 'Liste corrigée' selected (amber background) - VERIFIED
Gérante default view: 'Liste d'origine' selected (slate background) - VERIFIED
Admin in corrected view: Editor visible, can modify items - VERIFIED
Admin in original view: Editor hidden, read-only list shown - VERIFIED
Gérante in original view: Read-only list with original items - VERIFIED
Gérante in corrected view: Read-only list with corrected items - VERIFIED
Struck items in corrected view: line-through + red background - VERIFIED (found 4 elements with line-through, 1 container with red background)
Total adapts: 'Total d'origine' (30000 F) vs 'Total corrigé' (25000 F) - VERIFIED
Modified item (Item B qty 10→15) shows correctly in corrected view - VERIFIED
regression: First validation button ('Première validation') visible for pending expenses - VERIFIED
Strike reason dropdown with 'À reporter' option - VERIFIED
'Enregistrer modifications', 'Aperçu PDF', 'Envoyer à la gérante', 'Annuler validation' buttons visible - VERIFIED
Gérante sees '🔒 Lecture seule' badge - VERIFIED
